ELPAC Level 4
Lexile BR–300L
DTR · TALK ABOUT A SCENE

Say It, Write It, Keep It

STS-MS6-L4-BR300-MSSS6-PTN-MNA-02 • MS Social Studies Grade 6 • Ancient Hebrews and Judaism
Look at the picture. You will answer some questions about it. Press the play button to hear each question. Record your answer for each question. You can listen to your answer and record it again. Click SUBMIT RECORDINGS when you have answered all the questions.
JUST FOR FUN · OPTIONAL
Long before treaties were printed on paper, people in the ancient Near East made covenants. A covenant was a promise spoken out loud, witnessed by everyone standing there, and then written down so that no one could later say they forgot. The ancient Hebrews built their whole community around one, and the Torah scroll kept its words safe enough to carry from place to place for thousands of years. Today two groups in this library are arguing over one well, and they have decided to settle it the old way: say it, write it, keep it.
Why do you think people carved their most important promises into stone instead of just remembering them?
Optional. You do not have to record this one.
1
What is Miriam doing?
Look at the picture. Say: Miriam is ____. (writing / standing) Then say: I know because I see her ____. (pen / hat)
2
What is Eitan holding?
Look at the picture. Say: Eitan has a ____. (jug / pillow) Then say: I know because I see his ____. (hands / feet)
3
What is the teacher doing?
Look at the picture. Say: The teacher is ____ the paper. (opening / hiding) Then say: I know because I see her ____. (hands / shoes)
4
Where are these students? How do you know?
Look at the picture. Say: They are in a ____. (library / farm) Then say: I know because I see ____. (books / cows)
5
Tell me about this whole map.
Look at the picture. Look at the big map. Say: The map shows ____. (land / toys) Then say: I know because I see ____. (water / snow)
6
Tell me about what Noor is wearing.
Look at the picture. Find Noor. Say: Noor is wearing a ____ sweater. (yellow / gray) Then say: She is helping because I see ____ in her arms. (books / balls)
Record an answer for each question, then submit.
Content alignment: CA HSS 6.3 — Ancient Hebrews and Judaism (origins, covenant, Torah, and the moral and ethical law). ELD (Speaking — official ELPAC “Talk About a Scene”): PI.A.1, PII.B.3, PII.B.4, PII.B.5.
